functions.name: _run
functions.signature: def _run(args: list[str], session: str | None = None, **kwargs) -> subprocess.CompletedProcess
functions.description: 运行 zellij action 命令

functions.name: _run_global
functions.signature: def _run_global(args: list[str], session: str | None = None, **kwargs) -> subprocess.CompletedProcess
functions.description: 运行顶层 zellij 命令（非 action）

functions.name: ensure_session
functions.signature: def ensure_session(name: str, layout: str | None = None, config: str | None = None) -> str
functions.description: 创建或验证 session 存在（处理 EXITED session）

functions.name: _session_exited
functions.description: 检查 session 是否处于 EXITED 状态

functions.name: session_exists
functions.description: 检查 Zellij session 是否存在（剥离 ANSI 转义码）

functions.name: new_tab
functions.signature: def new_tab(session: str, name: str, command: str | None = None, cwd: str | None = None) -> str
functions.description: 创建新 tab（可选命令和 cwd）

functions.name: close_tab
functions.signature: def close_tab(session: str, tab_name: str) -> None
functions.description: 通过 tab_id 关闭 tab

functions.name: list_panes
functions.signature: def list_panes(session: str | None = None) -> list[dict]

functions.name: send_command
functions.signature: def send_command(session: str, pane_id: str, text: str) -> None
functions.description: 通过 write-chars + Enter 发送文本到 pane

functions.name: send_keys
functions.signature: def send_keys(session: str, pane_id: str, keys: str) -> None
functions.description: 发送特殊按键（Enter, Ctrl-C 等）

functions.name: dump_screen
functions.signature: def dump_screen(session: str, pane_id: str, full: bool = False) -> str
functions.description: 获取 pane 屏幕内容

functions.name: subscribe_pane
functions.signature: def subscribe_pane(session: str, pane_id: str) -> subprocess.Popen
functions.description: 启动 subscribe 进程用于流式读取

functions.name: tab_exists
functions.signature: def tab_exists(session: str, tab_name: str) -> bool
functions.description: 通过 list-panes 检查 tab 是否存在

functions.name: get_pane_id
functions.signature: def get_pane_id(session: str, tab_name: str) -> str | None
functions.description: 获取 tab 的 terminal pane ID（terminal_N 格式）

functions.name: go_to_tab
functions.signature: def go_to_tab(session: str, tab_name: str) -> None

functions.name: switch_session
functions.description: 切换到另一个 Zellij session
